title: Support, OOD and abstention coverage

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: Support coverage is limited and heterogeneous; the conformal element is an InterHub-calibrated support boundary, not an NSFC coverage guarantee.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

panel_map.b: Cell counts in abstention-relevant coverage bins.
panel_map.c: Frame-level support, abstention, OOD and optimizer-error counts.

evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: Do not present NSFC support boundaries as nominal conformal coverage.

statistics_notes: Rates are cell-level support fractions; frame counts aggregate corrected support-coverage rows.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: Do not present NSFC support boundaries as nominal conformal coverage.
